learning_outcomes.statement: Evaluate various strategies for self-directed learning and select appropriate methods for different academic contexts.
learning_outcomes.notes: Focus on comparing and contrasting strategies to promote effective autonomous learning.

learning_outcomes.statement: Design a personalized learning plan that incorporates goal setting, resource identification, and time management.
learning_outcomes.notes: Emphasize practical application of planning skills to support independent study.

learning_outcomes.statement: Apply self-assessment techniques to monitor progress and adjust learning approaches accordingly.
learning_outcomes.notes: Encourage reflective practice and adaptive learning behaviors.

alignment_notes: Outcomes focus on core skills for autonomous learning appropriate for undergraduate students within a typical session length.
